holdings.infoBox: CTEX is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are T1 Energy stock at 4.67%, FuelCell Energy at 4.10%, First Solar at 4.08%, Arcosa at 4.04%, and Eos Energy Enterprises at 3.93%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P Kensho Cleantech ETF (CTEX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Kensho Cleantech index. The fund tracks an index of US-listed companies involved in the development of technologies that enable clean energy generation. Holdings are equally-weighted within tiers. CTEX was launched on Sep 29, 2021 and is issued by ProShares.
